summary: Play Pillar Audit - Iteration 201. Tested Play page components, concierge wiring, service desk ticket creation, and mobile font compliance. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend components working correctly with proper concierge integration.

issues: Some elements have fonts below 13px: '100%' badge (10px), energy tags (11px), 'Indie' breed tag (11px)
Category strip labels correctly at 13px as required

action_items: MINOR: Bump font sizes for mobile 375px - '100%' badge, energy tags, breed tags should be ≥13px
critical_code_review_comments: GuidedPlayPaths.jsx correctly uses useConcierge.fire() (line 186) - NOT dead /api/concierge/play-path endpoint
PlayConciergeSection.jsx correctly fires tdc.view() on card click (line 74)
PlayContentModal.jsx shows Soul Made cross-sell in ALL categories except soul_made (line 599)
PillarSoulProfile trigger bar shows 100% score, 'Mira knows everything', pet photo, Indie breed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Play pillar audit complete. Key verified: (1) GuidedPlayPaths uses useConcierge.fire() not dead endpoint, (2) PlayConciergeSection fires tdc.view on card click, (3) Soul Made cross-sell visible in ALL categories, (4) PillarSoulProfile drawer opens with 100% score and 'Mira knows everything'. Mobile 375px has minor font issues (<13px) on some tags.

features_verified.play_page_loads: ✓ /play loads with hero, category strip, tabs, profile bar, guided paths, concierge section
features_verified.pillar_soul_profile_trigger_bar: ✓ Shows gradient border, 100% score, pet photo, 'Mira knows everything', chevron
features_verified.pillar_soul_profile_drawer: ✓ Opens on click with maxWidth, shows Energy/Exercise/Fave activity/Play style/With dogs/Walks per day
features_verified.guided_play_paths: ✓ 'Start path →' opens modal with step flow, submit fires useConcierge.fire()
features_verified.play_concierge_section: ✓ Service card click fires tdc.view before opening PlayConciergeModal
features_verified.play_concierge_modal: ✓ Shows activity options, 'Send to my Play Concierge →' button present
features_verified.soul_made_cross_sell: ✓ Visible in outings, playdates, fitness, swimming, bundles categories
features_verified.mobile_375px_fonts: ⚠ Category strip labels at 13px, but some tags below 13px
features_verified.mira_os_stream: ✓ POST /api/mira/os/stream accessible for play pillar context
